TALOS_CONFIG.description: Path to the talosconfig file containing mTLS certificates and endpoint configuration

TALOS_CONTEXT.description: Context name within the talosconfig file (uses default context if not set)

TALOS_WRITE_ENABLED.description: Set to "true" to enable write operations (default: false)

TALOS_NODES.description: Comma-separated list of default node IP addresses (overrides talosconfig nodes)
